title: LEM Enhanced
description: A simple modpack designed to enhance you experience on Legacy Edition Minigames
body:
## About
This modpack is designed for [Legacy Edition Minigames](https://www.legacyminigames.net/)
This modpack contains mods and customization to improve your experience on LEM.
(LEM is short for Legacy Edition Minigames)
## Features
### Mods
It uses mods to improve performance like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), etc.
It also has the [LEMClientHelper](https://modrinth.com/mod/lemclienthelper) for a specialized experience on LEM.
### Custom menus
I used [Fancymenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) and [Drippy Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen) to create custom game loading and main menu screens.
![Custom main menu image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6a25zoyV/images/8aa315e2ff98b53db763c0fda7b2f0a2002927a1.png)
![Custom loading screen image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6a25zoyV/images/58ef385ed0722f3e6ca79d425afceb8a4386992d.png)
## Notice
I am not affiliated with or part of the LEM team, I just enjoy the server and decided to make this one day in my free time. Do not report bugs specific to this modpack to the LEM developers.
